steps.t: Wheat can be found in the fields of the Northcotton Farm. Rosa Brockhouse asked you to gather some wheat to make flour for pie-crusts.
Edulf Tunnelly is at the windmill on the Northcotton Farm. Edulf Tunnelly will help you grind the wheat into flour.
Edulf Tunnelly is at the windmill at the Northcotton Farm. You should return to Edulf Tunnelly.
Rosa Brockhouse is at the Northcotton Farm. Rosa Brockhouse will be pleased to see the flour you helped make.
